findings.detail: Source-level pre-flight passed: 7 nodes (within 3–8), all labels ≤ 4 words in bold, all concepts trace directly to §5.1/§5.2/§5.4/§5.6 of the corpus, no bare acronyms, title in config block, layout LR with nested TB subgraphs matches side-by-side-contrast intent. Edge label removed to avoid edge_label_collision. PNG render required externally via: npx @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli -i <mmd_path> -o <png_path> -w 1400 -b transparent

stats.layout: flowchart LR (side-by-side panels with nested TB subgraphs)
